title: IIM Rohtak Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: IIM Rohtak Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: IIM Rohtak IPMAT Result 2026 Out for Integrated Programme in Management on the official website - iimrohtak.ac.in on 20-05-2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the IIM Rohtak result.

content.text: The Indian Institute of Management (IIM) Rohtak has officially released the IPMAT Result 2026 for candidates who appeared in the Integrated Programme in Management (IPM) entrance exam. Applicants can now check their selection status and scores online for the 2026 academic session. The result includes shortlisted candidates for further admission rounds.

IIM Rohtak Result 2026 has been released online on the official website - https://www.iimrohtak.ac.in/. Students can check and download their results by logging in with their registered credentials such as application number and password.
Candidates are advised to carefully verify all the details mentioned in the result. In case of any discrepancies, they should immediately contact the university authorities for correction.

IIM Rohtak has announced the IPMAT 2026 result for admission to its prestigious 5-year Integrated Programme in Management. Candidates can now access their results online through the official portal using their login credentials. The result marks the next stage of the selection process.

The Indian Institute of Management Rohtak has activated the direct link to check the IPMAT Result 2026. Candidates who appeared for the entrance exam can now instantly view and download their results from the official website. Use the link below to access your result.

sections.heading: How to Check IIM Rohtak IPMAT Result 2026

content.text: Follow these simple steps to check and download your result online:

items: Visit the official website of IIM Rohtak - https://www.iimrohtak.ac.in/
On the homepage, click on the "IPMAT Result 2026" link.
Enter your application number and password.
Your result will appear on the screen.
Download and take a printout for future reference.
